name: Haze: Carnival Of Horror
short_description: Trapped in an unfamiliar place surrounded by dangerous unknown creatures, solve puzzles, find hidden objects, and most importantly DON'T GET CAUGHT. Maybe there is a way out, and maybe even a reason for why you are here...
detailed_description:
Trapped in an unfamiliar place surrounded by dangerous unknown creatures, solve puzzles, find hidden objects, and most importantly DON'T GET CAUGHT. Maybe there is a way out, and maybe even a reason for why you are here...

Haze: Carnival Of Horror Includes a mixture of stealth and puzzle solving features, an escape room style base that involves solving puzzles and uncovering secrets with the added challenge of running for your life from killer clowns that will stop at nothing to stop you from leaving
about_the_game:
